questions.prompt: If you improve 1% each day for a year, how much better do you become?

questions.stem: What is the 'valley of disappointment' in the context of habit formation?

choices.text: The period when a habit becomes too boring to continue
The initial phase of habit formation before results become visible
The moment when you realize your goals were too ambitious
The drop in motivation after achieving a goal

questions.prompt: According to Atomic Habits, what is more effective for long-term success?

choices.text: Setting ambitious goals and working backward from them
Building systems and processes that support your desired outcomes
